topic: How one Oman retail company cut payroll prep from three days to two hours after switching to WPS-integrated payroll
format: Open with a SmartPro Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
36 hours a month. That's what payroll was costing one retail company in Oman — not in software fees, but in staff time, before they switched to SmartPro Hub.

One HR manager. Dozens of employees. A spreadsheet maze and a bank portal that connected to nothing.

After moving to WPS-integrated payroll on SmartPro Hub, that same process takes two hours.

No new hires. No workarounds. SmartPro Hub connects employee records, salary calculations, and direct WPS bank submission in one place — no re-entering data, no chasing confirmations, no reconciling three different files the morning payroll is due.

We built it this way because fragmented systems don't just waste time. They create errors that surface on payday, when there's no clean way to fix them without someone's morning going sideways.

Our customers in Oman run payroll for anywhere between 10 and 400+ employees through the same platform handling their SPF filings, Omanization compliance, and work permit tracking. One place, one source of truth.

If your team is still burning days on payroll prep every month, that's not a staffing problem. It's a process problem, and it's fixable.

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
